name: NatePad
subtitle: NatePad iOS & Web App Repository
description: An AltStore/Feather compatible source for the NatePad PGP notepad iOS application.

apps.name: NatePad
apps.subtitle: PGP notepad for iPhone
apps.localizedDescription: Encrypt, decrypt, sign, and verify PGP messages. Manage your OpenPGP keys — generate, import, and export. Private keys are stored in the iOS Keychain.

versions.localizedDescription:
## What's new in 2.1

**NatePad Web App** — a fully offline web app that mirrors the iOS app. Download `Natepad-Web.zip` from the release, extract, and open `index.html` in any modern browser.

**All 31 themes** from the iOS app are available in the web version.

**Full PGP operations** — Encrypt, Decrypt, Sign, and Verify messages using OpenPGP.js v5.11.2.

**Key Management** — Generate ECC (Curve25519) or RSA-4096 key pairs, import/export armored keys.

## Install iOS app via Feather / AltStore
1. Download `Natepad.ipa`
2. Open Feather or AltStore → **+** → choose the IPA

> Or add the repo source to Feather for automatic updates:
> `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nphil/natepad-ios/main/apps.json`
Unsigned IPA — sideload with AltStore. Built from `288c268` on 2026-05-24 14:01 UTC

## What's new in 1.1

**Decrypt key selector** — when you have multiple private keys, Decrypt mode now shows a picker so you choose exactly which key to use. No more entering passphrases for keys that don't match. Default is Auto-detect (tries all keys), which still works for single-key setups.

**Richer theme backgrounds** — three blurred orbs instead of two, with a dark accent-tinted base replacing pure black. Roughly half as much black showing through.

**Accent tinting throughout** — GlassCards, text areas, borders, recipient chips, and section titles now pick up the active theme colour instead of plain grey.

**Bug fix** — multiple private keys no longer cause repeated passphrase prompts during decrypt.

## Install via Feather / AltStore
1. Download `Natepad.ipa`
2. Open Feather or AltStore → **+** → choose the IPA

> Or add the repo source to Feather for automatic updates:
> `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nphil/natepad-ios/main/apps.json`

Initial release.

• Encrypt / Decrypt / Sign / Verify
• Key management (generate RSA-4096, import/export .asc)
• 5 themes with blurred gradient backgrounds
• Face ID / Touch ID lock
• Decrypt key selector for multi-key setups
